nodes.name: MarketRealtimeApplication.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot entry point for the market-realtime service, enabling application configuration binding and starting the runtime context.

nodes.name: MarketRealtimeApplication
nodes.summary: Application bootstrap class that registers AppConf as configuration properties and delegates startup to SpringApplication.

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Launches the market-realtime Spring Boot application from the command line.

nodes.name: AppConf.java
nodes.summary: Defines application configuration properties for Kafka, database, Redis, mail, PayOS, and service URI routing, with startup logging of configured values.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses Lombok @Data and nested static classes to bind hierarchical Spring @ConfigurationProperties under the app prefix.

nodes.name: AppConf
nodes.summary: Configuration holder for market-realtime runtime settings, including nested groups for Kafka topics, persistence, mail, payment credentials, and internal URI routes.

nodes.name: logConfig
nodes.summary: Logs the loaded application configuration after construction so Kafka, persistence, mail, payment, and route settings are visible at startup.

nodes.name: KafkaService.java
nodes.summary: Provides Kafka producer and consumer lifecycle management, message sending helpers, response serialization, and a protected hook for inbound message handling.
nodes.languageNotes: Combines Spring service injection with Apache Kafka producer/consumer APIs and a volatile flag for consumer-thread shutdown.

nodes.name: KafkaService
nodes.summary: Spring service encapsulating Kafka producer setup, asynchronous consumer polling, response publishing, JSON wrapping, and graceful shutdown.

nodes.name: connectProducer
nodes.summary: Closes any existing producer and creates a new KafkaProducer with the configured bootstrap servers, client id, group id, and string serializers.

nodes.name: createDefaultTopic
nodes.summary: Stores the default Kafka topic used by the single-argument send helper.

nodes.name: send
nodes.summary: Publishes payloads to Kafka, with overloads for default topic, explicit topic, and keyed records plus asynchronous send logging.

nodes.name: sendResponse
nodes.summary: Wraps a response payload in a Message envelope, serializes it to JSON, and publishes it to the target Kafka topic.

nodes.name: startConsumer
nodes.summary: Starts a Kafka consumer subscribed to the provided topics and runs a polling thread that dispatches each record to handleIncomingMessage.

nodes.name: subscribe
nodes.summary: Resubscribes an active Kafka consumer to a single topic and logs subscription failures.

nodes.name: shutdown
nodes.summary: Stops the consumer loop, wakes and joins the consumer thread, then flushes and closes the Kafka producer during bean destruction.

nodes.name: toJson
nodes.summary: Builds a Message envelope from a raw message and URI, then serializes it to JSON for Kafka publication.

nodes.name: KafkaListener.java
nodes.summary: Specializes KafkaService for the market-realtime application by subscribing to configured topics, routing inbound messages, and sending responses.

nodes.name: KafkaListener
nodes.summary: Kafka listener service that extends the base KafkaService and connects incoming Kafka payloads to MessageRouterService.

nodes.name: init
nodes.summary: Initializes Kafka topics, connects the producer, and starts the consumer after the Spring bean is constructed.

nodes.name: handleIncomingMessage
nodes.summary: Parses an inbound Kafka payload into a Message, routes it through MessageRouterService, and replies to the source topic when a response is produced.

nodes.name: Message.java
nodes.summary: Defines the Kafka message envelope used by market-realtime routing, including source id, event id, URI, timestamp, and payload.

nodes.name: Message
nodes.summary: Lombok-backed message envelope carrying routing metadata and arbitrary payload content with a UTC+7 default timestamp.

nodes.name: MailService.java
nodes.summary: Declares the mail service contract for welcome emails and overvaluation alert emails.

nodes.name: MailService
nodes.summary: Mail notification contract exposing operations for onboarding messages and stock overvaluation alerts.

nodes.name: MessageRouterService.java
nodes.summary: Routes Kafka message envelopes to user, stock, subscription, AHP config, stock-year-data, validation, portfolio, and webhook services based on configured URI prefixes.

nodes.name: MessageRouterService
nodes.summary: Central routing service that deserializes message payloads into DTOs and delegates each configured URI family to the matching domain service.

nodes.name: mapPayloadToDto
nodes.summary: Converts a message payload into a requested DTO type, accepting nulls, existing instances, JSON strings, and map-like deserialized objects.

nodes.name: routeMessage
nodes.summary: Validates a Message envelope, selects the appropriate URI family, maps the payload to a DTO, and dispatches to a route-specific helper.

nodes.name: routeUserMessage
nodes.summary: Routes configured user URIs to create, update, delete, password update, login, and favorite-stock user service operations.

nodes.name: routeStockMessage
nodes.summary: Routes stock URIs to create, update, delete, industry ratio updates, valuation recalculation, and match-price update operations.

nodes.name: routeSubscriptionMessage
nodes.summary: Routes subscription create, update, and delete URIs to the subscription service with consistent error responses.

nodes.name: routeAhpConfigMessage
nodes.summary: Routes AHP configuration create and update URIs to the AHP config service and returns structured failures for unknown routes.

nodes.name: routeYearDataMessage
nodes.summary: Routes stock-year-data create, update, and delete requests, extracting year path suffixes before delegating to StockYearDataService.

nodes.name: routeValidationMessage
nodes.summary: Routes validation-history requests by converting the payload to a list of StockYearDataHistoryRequestDto objects.

nodes.name: routePortfolioMessage
nodes.summary: Routes portfolio allocation requests to the portfolio allocation service and formats unknown-route or processing errors.

nodes.name: routeWebhooksMessages
nodes.summary: Routes payment webhook messages to subscription payment handling and suppresses responses when processing succeeds.

nodes.name: MailServiceImpl.java
nodes.summary: Implements email notifications using JavaMailSender and Thymeleaf templates for welcome messages and stock overvaluation alerts.

nodes.name: MailServiceImpl
nodes.summary: Spring mail service implementation that prepares Thymeleaf contexts for notification templates and sends HTML emails.

nodes.name: sendWelcome
nodes.summary: Builds a welcome-email template context with username, email, and login URL before sending the onboarding message.

nodes.name: sendOvervaluationAlert
nodes.summary: Builds an overvaluation alert email context from valuation indicators, current price, and stock metadata, then sends the alert template.

nodes.name: sendEmail
nodes.summary: Renders a Thymeleaf template to HTML, fills MIME message headers, and sends the email through JavaMailSender.

nodes.name: PaymentServiceImpl.java
nodes.summary: Implements payment-link creation through the PayOS SDK using subscription reference data and checkout return URLs.

nodes.name: PaymentServiceImpl
nodes.summary: Spring payment service implementation that creates PayOS payment requests and returns hosted checkout URLs.

nodes.name: createPayment
nodes.summary: Builds a PayOS payment-link request for a subscription reference and returns the generated checkout URL.

nodes.name: OvervaluationResult.java
nodes.summary: Defines the valuation result data model used to summarize overvaluation status and per-indicator outcomes for a stock.

nodes.name: OvervaluationResult
nodes.summary: Lombok data model describing a stock's overvaluation aggregate counts, percentage, boolean status, and indicator-level results.
